ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the user account is active */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the statistic belongs to */,
  "int" INTEGER /* INT value of the user */,
  "str" TEXT /* STR value of the user */,
  "spe" INTEGER /* SPE value of the user */,
  "dur" INTEGER /* DUR value of the user */,
  "pow" INTEGER /* POW value of the user */,
  "com" INTEGER /* COM value of the user */,
  "tier" INTEGER /* TIER value of the user */,
  "class" INTEGER /* CLASS value of the user */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the user */,
  "total_games_won" INTEGER /* Total number of games won by the user */,
  "total_games_lost" INTEGER /* Total number of games lost by the user */,
  "total_games_drawn" INTEGER /* Total number of games drawn by the user */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the user */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_statistics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the class icon */,
  "max_level" INTEGER /* Maximum level a user can achieve in this class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_requirements" (
  "req_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the requirement belongs to */,
  "int_req" INTEGER /* INT requirement for the class */,
  "str_req" INTEGER /* STR requirement for the class */,
  "spe_req" INTEGER /* SPE requirement for the class */,
  "dur_req" INTEGER /* DUR requirement for the class */,
  "pow_req" INTEGER /* POW requirement for the class */,
  "com_req" INTEGER /* COM requirement for the class */,
  "tier_req" INTEGER /* TIER requirement for the class */,
  "xp_req" INTEGER /* Experience points required to reach the next level in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("req_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_requirements_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gaming_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the history belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Indicate whether the game was single-player or multi-player */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent in multi-player games */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gaming_history_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gaming_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the ranking belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the ranking was last updated */,
  "rank_category" TEXT /* Category of the ranking (e.g., overall, class-specific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_classes" (
  "user_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-class entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the class belongs to */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class chosen by the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the class */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicate whether this is the user's primary class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_classes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_classes_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the progress belongs to */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the progress belongs to */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the user in the class */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Current experience points of the user in the class */,
  "last_level_up_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last leveled up in the class */,
  "xp_to_next_level" INTEGER /* Experience points needed to reach the next level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_progress_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., weapon, armor, potion) */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the item icon */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_items" (
  "user_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-item entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item owned by the user */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item owned by the user */,
  "equipped" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the item is equipped by the user */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the user acquired the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_items_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the administrator user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrator user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the admin user */,
  "is_superadmin" INTEGER /* Indicate whether the admin user is a superadmin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the achievement belongs to */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was earned */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the achievement icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "reported_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being reported */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., cheating, abusive behavior) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reports_reported_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
